output_summary: All required YAML blocks present in compressed form. Correct source-confirmed voltage values, missing current/reference-role fields, review-required thermal value, and no final harness approval claim. Gap accounting is less complete than c03/c04.

All required YAML blocks present. Correct confirmed and missing/review states. Weakness: source_gap_report records HB-2, HB-3, and GND open gap but under-records VIN_MAIN max_current as a first-class gap after HB-1 partial resolution.
All required YAML blocks present. Complete six-slot claim inventory, overlay-only patch, four gap/follow-up records, partial HB-1 delta, unchanged HB-2/HB-3, and explicit nonclosing provenance.
All required YAML blocks present. Similar to c03 with complete gap coverage and partial HB-1 handling. Slightly more verbose; no material quality improvement over c03 on this fixture.
Required blocks present and core counts correct, but incorrect blocker links and an owner-followup target typo make it unsafe for policy selection.
